experiment: E331 ours vs PPI-Affinity clone, matched leakage-free head-to-head
note: PPI-clone = faithful reimplementation of PPI-Affinity's method (ProtDCal-3D desc + StandardScaler + SVR-rbf, model E236) scored on the IDENTICAL 60%%-id clustered split as ours; the real PPI-Affinity web server has been down since 2022 so the original cannot be queried. The clustered/leakage-free r is the reported number.
